title: Epitheca
description: Epitheca is a mod that adds a variety of new craftable variants of existing blocks and items.
body:
![Epitheca](https://i.imgur.com/IbLf4YU.png)  

**Epitheca** is a mod that adds a variety of new craftable variants of existing blocks and items.  
It is currently heavily WIP, and as such, many features are not yet implemented.  

To get started with the mod, simply make the Recrafter and use it to convert blocks to their Epitheca variants!  
![Recrafter Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/iYgDpCF.png)

## Completed Features  
- Shroomlight Variants  
![Shroomlight Variants](https://i.imgur.com/Flbh72a.png)  
- Glowstone Variants  
![Glowstone Variants](https://i.imgur.com/DfLjkp7.png)
- Magma Variants  
![Magma Variants](https://i.imgur.com/gOhi5C6.gif)
- Door Variants  
![Door Variants](https://i.imgur.com/fUF1zbM.png)
- Bar Variants  
![Bar Variants](https://i.imgur.com/yyN2YFr.png)
- Pumpkin Variants  
![Pumpkin Variants](https://i.imgur.com/1XvrPaI.png)  
- Bookshelf Variants  
![Bookshelf Variants](https://i.imgur.com/2yrtmUL.png)
- Recrafter Block, GUI, recipes, etc.  
![Recrafter](https://i.imgur.com/2LKAx2V.png)
## Upcoming Features  
- Real Recrafter Recipes as opposed to whatever I'm doing right now  
- Recipe Book for Recrafter recipes
- JEI Integration for Recrafter recipes
- More Pumpkin / Jack O' Lantern Variants
- Froglight Variants
- Barrel Variants
- Moss Variants
- Replace natural generation of some blocks with a chance of being a variant? This one is a stretch
- More to come!
